<!-- generated: 2026-05-30 / uoink v3.2 -->
# Uoink full site context

## URL: https://uoink.app/
Uoink turns videos, podcasts, web pages, and social video into private local corpora for Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and MCP-capable agents. The core loop is capture, corpus, search, verify, write.

## URL: https://uoink.app/install
Install the desktop helper, install the browser extension, then click the Uoink button. The Windows helper runs from %LOCALAPPDATA%\Uoink and exposes localhost 127.0.0.1:5179. Browser extension support targets Chromium browsers. Chrome Web Store approval is pending, so the release zip is the launch path. macOS is on the v2.3 track.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features
The feature index groups Uoink into Capture, Library, Workspace, Verification, Distribution, and Identity. Dashboard and agents can fetch https://uoink.app/api/features-manifest for slug, name, URL, embed URL, status, category, summary, and MCP tools.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/in-page-button
Feature detail page: In-page Uoink button. Capture YouTube transcripts and frames directly from your browser. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/in-page-button?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/right-click-any-link
Feature detail page: Right-click context capture. Capture YouTube and X videos directly from link context menus. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/right-click-any-link?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/keyboard-shortcut
Feature detail page: Keyboard capture shortcut. Trigger instant video extraction with customizable keyboard shortcuts. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/keyboard-shortcut?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/mobile-playlist-bridge
Feature detail page: Mobile playlist bridge. Save videos on mobile and let Uoink automatically capture them on desktop. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/mobile-playlist-bridge?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/universal-page-uoink
Feature detail page: Universal page extraction. Extract clean markdown and metadata from any web page using local Crawl4AI. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/universal-page-uoink?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/twitter-video
Feature detail page: X video transcripts. Extract transcripts and creator citations from videos on X. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/twitter-video?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/podcast-feeds
Feature detail page: Podcast RSS ingestion. Poll podcast RSS feeds and transcribe episodes locally using Whisper. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/podcast-feeds?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/youtube-shorts
Feature detail page: YouTube Shorts transcription. Capture and classify YouTube Shorts to analyze fast-paced video hooks. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/youtube-shorts?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/playlist-mode
Feature detail page: Playlist queue extraction. Batch extract up to 10 YouTube videos at once with partial-failure tolerance. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/playlist-mode?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/memory-search
Feature detail page: Local SQLite FTS5 search. Search transcripts, comments, and metadata instantly using local SQLite full-text search. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/memory-search?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/faceted-classification
Feature detail page: Facet and tag organization. Organize your video corpus using automatically generated topic folders, hook types, and creator tags. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/faceted-classification?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/your-channel
Feature detail page: Your channel mode. Configure your own YouTube channel to analyze hook performance and audience patterns. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/your-channel?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/resurface-for-you
Feature detail page: Resurface for you. Discover forgotten insights in your video library with personalized local resurfacing cards. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/resurface-for-you?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/engagement-memory
Feature detail page: Engagement memory. Track which videos you reference most to build a durable local knowledge base. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/engagement-memory?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/taste-anchors
Feature detail page: Taste anchors calibration. Calibrate your local memory layer by selecting reference videos that define your research taste. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/taste-anchors?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/build-workspace
Feature detail page: Workspace assembly. Assemble a local markdown corpus from multiple video sources for a project workspace. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/build-workspace?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/critique-corpus
Feature detail page: Corpus analysis critique. Run structured critiques on your draft against a local video and article corpus. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/critique-corpus?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/script-studio
Feature detail page: Script studio workspace. Generate, revise, and outline video scripts grounded in your local markdown corpus. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/script-studio?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/writing-studio
Feature detail page: Writing studio tool. Generate tweets, threads, and blog posts grounded in your captured video corpus. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/writing-studio?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/style-anchors
Feature detail page: Style anchor management. Import and manage style anchors from Substack or text to guide AI voice tone. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/style-anchors?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/claim-extraction
Feature detail page: Claim extraction tool. Extract factual claims from transcripts to audit evidence and source references. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/claim-extraction?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/evidence-panel
Feature detail page: Evidence and citation panel. View supporting evidence and source citations for claims in your corpus. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/evidence-panel?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/mcp-server
Feature detail page: Model Context Protocol server. Turn Uoink into a local MCP server to give Claude and Cursor tools for video capture. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/mcp-server?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/claude-desktop-integration
Feature detail page: Claude Desktop MCP integration. Connect Uoink to Claude Desktop to let Claude capture and search video files. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/claude-desktop-integration?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/cursor-integration
Feature detail page: Cursor MCP integration. Add Uoink to Cursor to search and reference your video corpus inside your editor. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/cursor-integration?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/byo-anthropic-key
Feature detail page: Bring your own API key. Use your own Anthropic API key to run Hook Type and Comment Intelligence passes. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/byo-anthropic-key?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/local-first
Feature detail page: Local-first architecture. Save transcripts, comments, and databases to your local drive for private research. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/local-first?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/features/no-cloud
Feature detail page: No cloud database. Keep your video corpus and research private with no cloud databases or remote servers. Also supports https://uoink.app/features/no-cloud?embed=true for dashboard embeds without site chrome.

## URL: https://uoink.app/blog
Field notes index. Includes eight launch articles, tag filters, client-side search, RSS at https://uoink.app/blog/rss.xml, and TechArticle schema on each article.

## URL: https://uoink.app/blog/9-hook-types-every-creator-should-recognize
Launch article for creator research, local corpus workflows, writing, or MCP agent discovery.

## URL: https://uoink.app/blog/how-to-find-your-channels-overperformer-pattern
Launch article for creator research, local corpus workflows, writing, or MCP agent discovery.

Launch article for creator research, local corpus workflows, writing, or MCP agent discovery.

Launch article for creator research, local corpus workflows, writing, or MCP agent discovery.

Launch article for creator research, local corpus workflows, writing, or MCP agent discovery.

## URL: https://uoink.app/blog/tweet-what-you-learned-from-a-youtube-video
Launch article for creator research, local corpus workflows, writing, or MCP agent discovery.

## URL: https://uoink.app/blog/uoink-any-page-crawl4ai-fork
Launch article for creator research, local corpus workflows, writing, or MCP agent discovery.

## URL: https://uoink.app/blog/voice-dna-how-uoink-writes
Launch article for creator research, local corpus workflows, writing, or MCP agent discovery.

## URL: https://uoink.app/agents
Agent setup explains the local Model Context Protocol server, stdio transport, and config snippets for AI clients.

## URL: https://uoink.app/mcp
Machine-readable MCP discovery surface with manifest JSON at https://uoink.app/mcp/manifest.json.

## URL: https://uoink.app/privacy
Privacy policy: no Uoink cloud, no account, no telemetry, optional Anthropic calls use the user's own key.

## URL: https://uoink.app/about
About page explains the open-source posture and shows one public GitHub release download total. Counts come from GitHub's public Releases API. Uoink tracks no download identities.
